basic_details.job_title: MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 43 Graduate & Technician Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Mishra Dhatu Nigam Limited (MIDHANI), Kanchan Bagh, Hyderabad – 500 058
basic_details.post_name: Graduate Apprentice Trainee (GAT) & Technician (Diploma) Apprentice Trainee (TAT)
basic_details.short_information: MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026: Get the latest Mishra Dhatu Nigam Limited (MIDHANI) recruitment notification 2026 for 43 Graduate & Technician (Diploma) Apprentice Trainee vacancies under MIDHANI, Hyderabad. The last date to apply and send the application through registered post/courier is 3rd June 2026 (5:00 PM). Find MIDHANI Apprentice vacancies on the official website midhani-india.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of “Upcoming MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026” notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the direct official link for MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitm

application_fee.details: The notification does not mention any application fee for MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026. No TA/DA will be paid to candidates for attending selection/verification. No boarding or lodging expenses are admissible.

qualification.details: Candidates must be Engineering passouts from the years 2023, 2024, 2025, or 2026. Candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing apprenticeship under the Apprentices (Amendment) Act 1973, and/or having one year or more of experience, are not eligible to apply. Reservation guidelines under the Apprentices Act for EWS/OBC/SC/ST/PWD will be followed. Candidates claiming reservation must provide certificates in Government standard format; failing which their claim will be treated as General/UR category. OBC candidates must produce OBC certificate in Govt. prescribed format from the certificate issuing authority of Tahsildar. | Minimum Educational Qualification

selection_process: Selection of candidates will be based on merit against reservation categories. Merit will be decided on the basis of percentage of marks obtained in SSC (30%) and Graduation/Diploma in Engineering (70%). The final selection will be subject to verification of certificates (Age
Police Verification/Clearance Certificate) and medical fitness.
MIDHANI reserves the right to restrict/increase the number of posts
and devise its own selection criteria. Upon completion of the apprenticeship period
MIDHANI shall have no obligation to offer employment
nor can an apprentice claim right for employment on the grounds of completion of Apprenticeship.
how_to_apply: Candidates must first register at the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) portal at https://nats.education.gov.in. After successful NATS enrollment (allow at least one day for verification and approval), candidates must apply online to MIDHANI through the portal and also send the application form along with all supporting documents (NATS Enrollment Number, Age proof, Qualification certificates, Category certificate, and Aadhar) through registered post or courier to reach on or before 03-06-2026 (5:00 PM) at the address below. No TA/DA will be paid for attending selection. For NATS portal enrollment queries, contact [email protected] or [email protected]. For other clarifications, call 040-2418-4508.
Steps to Apply on NATS Portal (Already Enrolled Students):
Login to https://nats.education.gov.in
Click Establishment Request Menu → Find Establishment
Upload Resume → Choose Establishment name → Type ‘MISHRA DHATAU NIGAM LIMITED’ and search
Click Apply → Click Apply again
Steps to Apply on NATS Portal (New Students — Not Yet Enrolled):
Go to https://nats.education.gov.in/student_login.php
Click Student → Register → Enroll → Complete the enrollment form
A unique Enrollment Number will be generated; wait at least one day for verification/approval
After approval, follow the same steps as enrolled students above
Documents to be Sent Along with Application (by Registered Post/Courier):
NATS Enrollment Number proof
Age proof (Birth Certificate / 10th Certificate)
SSC (10th) Marksheet and Certificate
Graduation / Diploma in Engineering Marksheets and Certificates
EWS / OBC / SC / ST / PWD Category Certificate in Government standard format (if applicable)
Aadhar Card copy
Police Verification / Clearance Certificate

Application and supporting documents to be sent to: Addl. General Manager – I/c Training & Development Department, MIDHANI, Kanchanbagh, Hyderabad – 500 058. Must reach on or before 03-06-2026, 05:00 PM.
Apply Online at: https://nats.education.gov.in
important_instructions: Only Engineering passouts of 2023, 2024, 2025, and 2026 are eligible to apply. Candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing Apprenticeship under Apprentices (Amendment) Act 1973, or have one year or more experience, are not eligible. Candidates must register on NATS portal (https://nats.education.gov.in) and also send physical application with supporting documents by registered post/courier. Candidates claiming EWS/OBC/SC/ST/PWD reservation must provide certificates in Government standard format; failing which claim will be treated as General/UR. OBC candidates must produce OBC certificate from the Tahsildar in Govt. prescribed OBC format. No TA/DA or boarding/lodging expenses will be paid for attending selection or document verification. Upon completion of Apprenticeship, MIDHANI has no obligation to offer employment; the apprentice cannot claim any right to employment on completion of training. MIDHANI reserves the right to restrict/increase the number of posts, alter eligibility criteria, and devise its own selection criteria. For portal enrollment queries, contact: [email protected] or [email protected]. For other clarifications, contact: 040-2418-4508.

faq.question: Q1. What is MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is a notification released by Mishra Dhatu Nigam Limited (MIDHANI), a Mini Ratna‑I PSU under the Ministry of Defence, for engagement of Graduate and Technician (Diploma) Apprentice Trainees for one year at its Hyderabad unit. The recruitment is being conducted under the Apprentices (Amendment) Act 1973/1992 for a total of 43 apprentice seats.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 43 apprentice vacancies have been announced under Advertisement No. MDN/HR/AT/02/26 dated 18/05/2026. Out of these, 23 posts are for Graduate Apprentice Trainees (GATs) and 20 posts are for Technician (Diploma) Apprentice Trainees (TATs) across Metallurgy, Mechanical, Electrical/EEE, Civil and ECE/IT disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for MIDHANI Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: The advertisement for MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026 is dated 18 May 2026. The last date for NATS portal registration and receipt of physical application by registered post/courier at MIDHANI is 03 June 2026 up to 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for MIDHANI Graduate and Technician Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: For Graduate Apprentice Trainee (GAT), candidates must have a degree in Engineering or Technology in the relevant discipline from a recognized university or institution, and be passouts of 2023, 2024, 2025 or 2026. For Technician (Diploma) Apprentice Trainee (TAT), candidates must hold a Diploma in Engineering or Technology in the relevant discipline from a State Technical Board or recognized university, also passing out in 2023, 2024, 2025 or 2026.

faq.question: Q5. Are candidates with prior apprenticeship or work experience eligible to apply?
faq.answer: Candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing apprenticeship training under the Apprentices (Amendment) Act 1973 are not eligible to apply. Similarly, candidates having one year or more of work experience after acquiring the required qualification are not eligible for MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification states that age will be as per Apprenticeship Rules. No specific upper or lower age limit has been separately mentioned in the advertisement, so candidates must meet the age conditions prescribed in the Apprenticeship Rules in force.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on a merit list prepared against reservation categories using academic performance. Merit will be calculated by giving 30% weightage to SSC (10th) marks and 70% weightage to marks obtained in Graduation (for GAT) or Diploma (for TAT) in the relevant engineering discipline.

faq.question: Q8. What is the stipend for MIDHANI Graduate and Technician Apprentices?
faq.answer: Selected Graduate Apprentice Trainees (GATs) will be paid a monthly stipend of Rs. 12,300. Technician (Diploma) Apprentice Trainees (TATs) will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 10,900 during the one‑year apprenticeship training period.

faq.question: Q9. How to apply online/offline for MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: First, candidates must register and enroll themselves on the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) portal at nats.education.gov.in and then apply to “MISHRA DHATU NIGAM LIMITED” through the Establishment Request section. After online enrollment, candidates must also send their application along with supporting documents (NATS Enrollment Number proof, age proof, SSC and Degree/Diploma certificates, category certificate, Aadhaar and Police Verification/Clearance) by registered post/courier so as to reach MIDHANI, Kanchanbagh, Hyderabad – 500 058 on or before 03‑06‑2026 (5:00 PM).

faq.question: Q10. Does MIDHANI Apprentice Recruitment 2026 provide permanent job after training?
faq.answer: No, engagement as an Apprentice Trainee in MIDHANI is purely for training under the Apprentices Act and does not guarantee any permanent or contractual employment. After completion of the apprenticeship period, MIDHANI has no obligation to offer a job, and apprentices cannot claim any right to employment on the basis of having completed training.
